title: Not able to create mirrored column without linking board a second time
excerpt: I have two boards that I linked a year ago and created mirrored columns at that time. I now want to add one more mirrored column and Monday.com prompts me to create a new link to the same board (and thus add another link…

posts.author: NelMIH (Nel Ellwein)
posts.cookedHtml: I have two boards that I linked a year ago and created mirrored columns at that time. I now want to add one more mirrored column and Monday.com prompts me to create a new link to the same board (and thus add another linking column). How do I simply add one more mirrored column linked to the same board?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Just go to the settings of the existing connect board column…
